violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
Sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The door to the outside, located at the back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The ceiling in the bathroom is in poor repair, observed missing tiles. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
